title: The Den: Vanilla Valleys
description: A tweaked variation of Fabulously Optimised, tweaked for Voice Chat, Player Models, VR, and UnSilk.
body:
# The Den: Vanilla Valleys

**Sweet, simple, small.**

Just a tweaked version of [Fabulously Optimised](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) with the following additions:

- [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft)
- [Unsilk](https://modrinth.com/datapack/unsilk) (By me :3)
- [Customizable Player Models](https://modrinth.com/plugin/custom-player-models)
- [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) (With a selection of add-ons)

Mainly exists to make it easier for players of The Den: Vanilla Valleys to download and update their packs.

**For a more modded experience, check out [my other The Den modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-den)!**

## License
Do whatever you like as long as you follow the license terms set by the mod creators
